content.json:
# Virtual WAN — Site-to-Site VPN Gateway Traffic
**Theme:** vWAN traffic analysis · **Data source:** `AzureDiagnostics` (ResourceType `VPNGATEWAYS`) + `AzureMetrics`.

Tunnel up/down per connection, bytes in/out, IKE diagnostics, and top connections by volume.

> Requires diagnostic settings on the vWAN VPN gateways (TunnelDiagnosticLog / IKEDiagnosticLog).

content.query: AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceType == 'VPNGATEWAYS' and Category == 'TunnelDiagnosticLog' | summarize Events=count(), LastEvent=max(TimeGenerated) by Resource, status_s, remoteIP_s | sort by Events desc
content.title: Tunnel up/down per connection

content.query: AzureMetrics | where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.NETWORK' and MetricName in ('TunnelEgressBytes', 'TunnelIngressBytes') | summarize Bytes=sum(Total) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), MetricName | render timechart
content.title: VPN tunnel bytes in/out

content.query: AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceType == 'VPNGATEWAYS' and Category == 'IKEDiagnosticLog' | summarize Count=count() by Resource, Message | top 100 by Count desc
content.title: IKE / renegotiation diagnostics

content.query: AzureMetrics | where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.NETWORK' and MetricName in ('TunnelEgressBytes', 'TunnelIngressBytes') | summarize Bytes=sum(Total) by Resource | top 20 by Bytes desc | render barchart
content.title: Top connections by volume
